ddls:
CREATE TABLE "maintenance_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the task */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the task (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "budget_hours" REAL /* Budgeted hours for the task */,
  "annual_time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the task annually */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer responsible for the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the task belongs to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "last_completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was last completed */,
  "next_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the task is next scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_tasks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_tasks_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the engineer */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the engineer was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engineers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., System, Cloud, Network) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task schedule */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being scheduled */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when a reminder should be sent to the engineer */,
  "reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the reminder has been sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_schedules_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES maintenance_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task executed */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer who executed the task */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was executed */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the task in hours */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task execution (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the task execution */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer who approved the task execution */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the task execution was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES maintenance_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the event occurred on */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Error, Warning, Information) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the system */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the system */,
  "last_backup_date" TEXT /* Date of the last backup */,
  "next_backup_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled backup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud service */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the cloud service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cloud service (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_service_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user of cloud services */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud service the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, User) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_service_users_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_service_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud service log entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud service the event occurred on */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Error, Warning, Information) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_service_logs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the network device (e.g., Router, Switch) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the network device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the network device (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the network device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the network device */,
  "last_firmware_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last firmware update */,
  "next_firmware_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled firmware update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network device the event occurred on */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Error, Warning, Information) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firewall_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firewall rule */,
  "firewall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firewall the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action of the rule (e.g., Allow, Deny) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rule */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the rule */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number for the rule */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer who last modified the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firewall_rules_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firewall_rules_firewall_id FOREIGN KEY ("firewall_id") REFERENCES firewalls ("firewall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firewalls" (
  "firewall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firewall */,
  "firewall_name" TEXT /* Name of the firewall */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the firewall */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the firewall (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_firmware_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last firmware update */,
  "next_firmware_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled firmware update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firewall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firewall_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firewall log entry */,
  "firewall_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firewall the event occurred on */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Error, Warning, Information) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firewall_logs_firewall_id FOREIGN KEY ("firewall_id") REFERENCES firewalls ("firewall_id")
)
